title: WADATIKA HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: WADATIKA HEALTH CENTER WADATIKA HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services. Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members or children of tribal members Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm, closed holidays (541) 573-8050 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 573-8050 Intake (541) 573-8043 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Harney County Services: Indian Health Service Clinics If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
